title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/12/2024
Today, iron ore futures continued to drop slightly, with the most-traded I2505 contract closing at 769 yuan/mt, down 0.77% for the day.Traders showed low enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills remained cautious and exhibited average purchase willingness. In Shandong, mainstream transaction prices for PB fines were at 765-770 yuan/mt, down 5 yuan/mt from yesterday. In Tangshan, PB fines transaction prices were around 780 yuan/mt, also down 5 yuan/mt from yesterday.
